flatpak.reason: The accepted route invokes the archived Wine runner directly.

user_namespaces.reason: The accepted direct-Wine route did not use a user namespace.

network_namespaces.reason: Independent network-denial acceptance is still pending.

vulkan.reason: The accepted profile uses DXVK 3.0.1 through Vulkan.

python.reason: The generated portable runtime is Python standard-library code.

notes: Verified on the reference Linux x86_64 host with the archived ge-proton11-1 runner, Wine 11.0 Staging, DXVK 3.0.1, and a regenerated relative dosdevices/c: link. Python 3 is required by the generated self-contained launchers in orchestrator 0.9.0.
